ddls:
CREATE TABLE "optimization_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization run */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the optimization run */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the optimization run */,
  "planning_units" INTEGER /* Number of planning units involved in the run */,
  "connectivity_total" INTEGER /* Total connectivity metric */,
  "connectivity_in" INTEGER /* In-bound connectivity metric */,
  "connectivity_edge" INTEGER /* Edge connectivity metric */,
  "connectivity_out" INTEGER /* Out-bound connectivity metric */,
  "connectivity_in_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of in-bound connectivity */,
  "penalty" INTEGER /* Penalty associated with the run */,
  "shortfall" INTEGER /* Shortfall associated with the run */,
  "missing_values" INTEGER /* Number of missing values in the run */,
  "mpm" INTEGER /* Multi-Period Model (MPM) indicator */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the optimization run was performed */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the optimization run */,
  "run_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who initiated the run */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the run */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the planning unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the planning unit (e.g., region, project) */,
  "unit_location" TEXT /* Location of the planning unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the planning unit */,
  "unit_size" INTEGER /* Size or capacity of the planning unit */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the planning unit */,
  "unit_status" TEXT /* Status of the unit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "unit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the unit */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the unit */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the unit */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connectivity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connectivity metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "total_connectivity" INTEGER /* Total connectivity metric */,
  "inbound_connectivity" INTEGER /* In-bound connectivity metric */,
  "edge_connectivity" INTEGER /* Edge connectivity metric */,
  "outbound_connectivity" INTEGER /* Out-bound connectivity metric */,
  "inbound_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of in-bound connectivity */,
  "connectivity_status" TEXT /* Status of the connectivity metrics (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "connectivity_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the connectivity metrics */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the connectivity metrics */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the connectivity metrics */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connectivity_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "penalty_value" INTEGER /* Value of the penalty */,
  "penalty_description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty */,
  "penalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the penalty (e.g., applied, waived) */,
  "penalty_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the penalty */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the penalty */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the penalty */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shortfalls" (
  "shortfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shortfall */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "shortfall_value" INTEGER /* Value of the shortfall */,
  "shortfall_description" TEXT /* Description of the shortfall */,
  "shortfall_status" TEXT /* Status of the shortfall (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "shortfall_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shortfall */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the shortfall */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the shortfall */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shortfall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shortfalls_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missing_values" (
  "missing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missing value */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "missing_value_count" INTEGER /* Count of missing values */,
  "missing_value_description" TEXT /* Description of the missing values */,
  "missing_status" TEXT /* Status of the missing values (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "missing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the missing values */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the missing value entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the missing value entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("missing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missing_values_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance indicator */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run */,
  "mpm_value" INTEGER /* Value of the Multi-Period Model (MPM) indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance indicator */,
  "indicator_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance indicator (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "indicator_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance indicator */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the performance indicator */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the performance indicator */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_indicators_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, executive) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the optimization run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the access log entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the access log entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES optimization_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
